data.name: Hentai Age Classic
data.detailed_description:
Begin a tranquil and captivating puzzle journey where each finished stage unveils a breathtaking portrait of a beautiful girl. Immerse yourself in a serene setting as you thoughtfully place every piece, gradually bringing each illustration to life.

Take your time—there are no timers, no pressure, and no rush. Experience fluid, relaxing gameplay crafted for comfort and pure enjoyment. Whether you play casually to unwind or love solving puzzles in depth, this game delivers soothing visuals and a gentle escape you can revisit whenever you like.

Key Features :

Discover elegant artwork – Unlock beautifully designed portraits as you advance through the game.

Relaxing soundtrack – Soft, atmospheric music enhances the peaceful mood.

Full illustration gallery – Revisit every completed image in high detail anytime.

Numerous levels – Enjoy a wide range of stages with progressively engaging challenges.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 日文*, 韓文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
